_meta.title: Kenya CBC Curriculum Reference Data
_meta.description: Portable reference dataset mapping CBC grade names to learning areas, strands, sub-strands, and learning outcomes. The backend loads this file when seeding curriculum for a CBC school.
_meta.source: docs/cbc-cariculum.json — compiled from KICD curriculum designs (kicd.ac.ke)
_meta.usage: Match grade.name against the grades seeded in 000002_seed.up.sql, then insert learning areas, strands, sub-strands, and outcomes using runtime-allocated UUIDs.

sub_strands.name: Listening and Attention
outcomes: Develop appropriate listening skills from varied experiences to enrich their ability to communicate
Participate in conversation using appropriate verbal and non-verbal language in everyday experiences

sub_strands.name: Free Expression
outcomes: Express own opinions, ideas and feelings creatively, freely and confidently in varied situations as they appreciate others

sub_strands.name: Pre-Number Activities (Matching, Sorting, Classifying)
outcomes: Sort and classify objects according to one attribute such as colour, shape or size
Match objects in a one-to-one correspondence for counting readiness

sub_strands.name: Conversation and Polite Language
outcomes: Communicate appropriately using verbal and/or non-verbal modes in a variety of contexts
Demonstrate appropriate etiquette in social relationships

sub_strands.name: Number Recognition and Counting
outcomes: Recite number names in sequence for number readiness
Demonstrate basic numeracy skills for learning

sub_strands.name: Drawing and Colouring
outcomes: Create artworks to share ideas, thoughts, feelings and experiences for learning and enjoyment
Appreciate own and others' artworks from within their social context and culture

sub_strands.name: Pre-Number Activities
outcomes: Sort objects according to colour, shape and size for classification
Make patterns using real objects to develop logical reasoning

sub_strands.name: Number and Place Value (1-10)
outcomes: Recite number names up to 50 in sequence
Identify place value of ones and tens

sub_strands.name: Locomotor Skill: Walking
outcomes: Name the parts of the body that are in use when walking for body awareness
Perform walking in different ways for strength, coordination, endurance, balance and space awareness

sub_strands.name: Locomotor Skill: Running
outcomes: Perform running in different ways for strength, coordination, endurance, balance and space awareness
Observe rules when playing games for own and others' safety

sub_strands.name: Locomotor Skill: Jumping for Height
outcomes: Perform jumping for height in different ways for strength, coordination, endurance, balance and space awareness
Appreciate jumping for height for strength, coordination, balance and self-esteem

sub_strands.name: Non-Locomotor Skill: Stretching
outcomes: Perform stretching in different ways for flexibility, agility, coordination and space awareness
Establish relationships through stretching for critical thinking and problem solving

sub_strands.name: Manipulative Skill: Overarm Throw
outcomes: Perform the overarm throw in different ways for strength, coordination, endurance, balance and space awareness
Make appropriate play items for creativity and imagination

sub_strands.name: Water Safety: Pool Rules
outcomes: Familiarize with the pool rules for safety
Observe sanitation around the pool environs for personal hygiene

sub_strands.name: Basic Swimming Skills: Exhaling in Water
outcomes: Practice exhaling in water for sustained swimming
Appreciate exhaling in water for stamina and endurance

sub_strands.name: Static Balances: Single Leg Balance
outcomes: Perform the single leg balance for coordination, balance, strength and space awareness
Appreciate performing the single leg balance for self-esteem

sub_strands.name: Keeping the School Environment Clean
outcomes: Name ways of keeping the school environment clean
Clean the school environment for the well-being of self and others

sub_strands.name: Family Needs and Wants
outcomes: Mention differences between family needs and wants
Classify family needs and wants for financial literacy awareness

sub_strands.name: Care of Personal and Common Items
outcomes: Differentiate between personal and common items used at home
Clean personal and common items using locally available materials

sub_strands.name: Place Value
outcomes: Identify the place value of ones, tens and hundreds
Use place value to compare and order numbers

sub_strands.name: Matumizi ya Lugha ya Heshima
outcomes: Kutumia lugha ya heshima katika mazungumzo ya kila siku
Kushiriki katika mazungumzo kwa kujiamini

sub_strands.name: Care of the Body
outcomes: Practice hygiene, nutrition, sanitation and safety skills to promote health and wellbeing
Demonstrate correct handwashing procedure to prevent communicable diseases

sub_strands.name: Properties of the Three States of Matter
outcomes: Demonstrate the properties of the three states of matter through hands-on activities
Practice preventive health measures, such as avoiding blowing air into a shared balloon, when carrying out activities on matter

sub_strands.name: Management of Solid Waste
outcomes: Identify solid waste within the school compound and its environment
Discuss ways of managing different types of solid waste in the environment

sub_strands.name: Water Conservation
outcomes: Explain the meaning of water conservation
Discuss ways water is wasted at home and at school

sub_strands.name: Location, Position and Size of Kenya
outcomes: Identify countries that neighbour Kenya
Locate the position of Kenya in relation to her neighbours using a compass direction
Value good relations between Kenya and her neighbours

sub_strands.name: Listening Comprehension: Oral Narratives
outcomes: Recognise sounds, words and phrases correctly
Listen for the main idea and specific details for effective communication

sub_strands.name: Filling in Forms
outcomes: Record specific details in a variety of forms
Acknowledge the importance of filling forms correctly

sub_strands.name: Whole Numbers
outcomes: Read and write numbers in symbols and words up to millions
Round off numbers to the nearest given place value

sub_strands.name: Plants and Animals
outcomes: Classify plants and animals based on observable characteristics
Appreciate the role of plants and animals in the ecosystem

sub_strands.name: Whole Numbers
outcomes: Identify place value and total value of digits in large numbers
Apply whole numbers to perform mathematical operations in real-life situations

sub_strands.name: Listening Comprehension
outcomes: Listen attentively and respond to a variety of oral texts
Use appropriate non-verbal cues during listening for effective communication

sub_strands.name: Crop Husbandry Practices
outcomes: Identify common crops grown in the local area
Practice basic crop husbandry activities such as planting and tending crops in the school farm

sub_strands.name: Introduction to Entrepreneurship
outcomes: Explain the meaning and importance of entrepreneurship
Design a simple mini business plan and pitch the idea to peers

sub_strands.name: Decision Making and Coping with Stress
outcomes: Identify personal strengths and areas for self-improvement
Demonstrate appropriate ways of coping with stress in day-to-day life

sub_strands.name: Elements and Compounds
outcomes: Distinguish between an element and a compound
Relate common elements to their chemical symbols
Appreciate the information found on packaging labels of commonly consumed substances

sub_strands.name: Independent Reading
outcomes: Identify print and non-print texts that are interesting to read
Appreciate the importance of reading for enjoyment

sub_strands.name: Polite Language (Telephone Etiquette)
outcomes: Use polite expressions appropriately during telephone conversations
Demonstrate conversational skills such as disagreeing politely

sub_strands.name: Self-Improvement
outcomes: Describe personality traits for self-understanding
Appreciate the role of values in the development of personality traits

sub_strands.name: Scientific Methods and Skills
outcomes: Apply the scientific method to investigate a problem
Appreciate the role of scientific investigation in solving real-life problems

sub_strands.name: Separation Techniques
outcomes: Select appropriate methods of separating different types of mixtures
Apply separation techniques to solve everyday problems

sub_strands.name: Interdependence of Living Things
outcomes: Describe the interdependence between living things and their environment
Advocate for conservation of the environment for sustainable living

sub_strands.name: Forms and Sources of Energy
outcomes: Identify various forms and sources of energy used in day-to-day life
Appreciate the importance of renewable sources of energy for sustainable development

sub_strands.name: Real Numbers
outcomes: Identify and categorise whole numbers as odd, even, prime, composite, rational and irrational
Use the reciprocal of real numbers to work out mathematical tasks

sub_strands.name: Application of Indices and Logarithms
outcomes: Derive and apply the laws of indices in different situations
Determine and apply common logarithms of numbers in mathematical computations

sub_strands.name: Formation and Simplification of Quadratic Expressions
outcomes: Form quadratic expressions from given mathematical statements or real-life situations
Simplify quadratic expressions using appropriate mathematical operations

sub_strands.name: Principles of Inheritance
outcomes: Explain the basic principles of Mendelian inheritance
Apply genetic principles to solve simple monohybrid cross problems

sub_strands.name: Kenya's Foreign Policy
outcomes: Explain the principles guiding Kenya's foreign policy
Appreciate Kenya's role in regional and international cooperation

sub_strands.name: Project Execution and Portfolio Development
outcomes: Plan and execute a community service project addressing an identified community need
Present a portfolio of evidence demonstrating impact and reflection on the project
